name: Tooltip
description: Floating hint card. 3 sizes (2X-Small/X-Small are plain single-line text; Large adds an icon + title/description + dismiss), 8 placements (top/bottom x left/center/right, plus side left/right), and an optional dark mode.
sourceNote: Figma hardcoded 48 variants (8 placements x 3 sizes x 2 dark-mode states), each with its own raster 'Tail' asset. Reused the CSS rotated-square tail technique already established in Popover instead of importing 18 raster assets — same border-omit-per-edge approach, extended with a dark-mode background swap and a size-driven corner offset (8px/12px/16px for sm/md/lg, matching the Figma trace's pl-8/pl-12/pl-16 values). The Large size's leading icon reuses RemixIcon's `global-line` glyph and its dismiss button reuses the existing `CompactButton` (style="ghost" size="md"), matching Popover's precedent.
